deviations.description: The process model enforces assessment and recording the reason after 15 minutes if the donor is still bleeding or in pain, but Version 2 only requires assessment after 20 minutes and only for bleeding. The process is stricter than required by Version 2.
The process model triggers obligations for both bleeding and pain, but Version 2 only requires action for bleeding. The process enforces obligations for pain, which is no longer required.
The process model requires recording the reason in the system, but Version 2 no longer obligates this action. The process enforces an outdated requirement.
